caption: A news broadcast features four men seated behind a table at a press conference, with several microphones positioned in front of them. The men are dressed in professional attire: one wears a white shirt and dark jacket, another a white scarf over a dark garment, a third a navy blue blazer, and the fourth a light-colored vest over a shirt. In the background, a sign reads "राजीव भवन थाना मोड़". The screen is overlaid with "NEWS 18 इंडिया" logos and a red and yellow ticker. In the first frame, a red banner reads "मुख्यमंत्री नीतीश कुमार". By the second frame, a headline appears: "2024 में JDU के साथ 'खेला' होगा?". The third frame displays "कांग्रेस चटपटाई, तेजस्वी की 'पिक्चर' बाकी है", while the fourth shows "नीतीश को तेजस्वी की 'सीधी धमकी'". Throughout the sequence, the men remain seated and relatively still, while the on-screen text and news banners change to report different headlines, and "BREAKING NEWS" flashes at the bottom.
